blocks.content:
The Grafana Cloud IIS integration comes with pre-built dashboards that you can use immediately.

In this step, you'll install those dashboards and learn where to find them.
> **Did you know?** You aren't limited to using the pre-built dashboards. You can create your own custom dashboards tailored to your specific IIS monitoring needs.
To install and view IIS dashboards:

In the **Install dashboards and alerts** section, click **Install** to add the pre-built dashboards and alerts.

You should see the message: **Dashboards and alerts have been installed.**

After installation completes, click **View Dashboards** to see the installed dashboards.

You'll see a folder containing the IIS dashboards.
In the next milestone, you'll explore the IIS dashboards and learn what each metric tells you.
